summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School Management System teacher and student workflows. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate for teacher/student workflows), frontend login and dashboards work correctly, but navigation and logout functionality have issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation links in sidebar (Dashboard, Attendance, Assignments, Progress) are not clickable or not properly routed
ui_bugs.details: Sidebar navigation items exist but clicking them doesn't navigate to the respective pages

ui_bugs.issue: Logout functionality not accessible via standard user dropdown
ui_bugs.details: Both teacher and student logout buttons are not found in user dropdown menus

ui_bugs.issue: Student My Courses page shows empty content despite being enrolled in courses
ui_bugs.details: John Smith should see enrolled courses (MATH101, PHY101, ENG101) but page appears empty

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height calculation errors in both teacher and student dashboards
ui_bugs.details: Charts showing width(-1) and height(-1) errors, affecting dashboard visualization

integration_issues.issue: Teacher cannot navigate between different sections (Attendance, Assignments, Progress) via sidebar
Student cannot navigate between different sections (Dashboard, Attendance, Assignments, Progress) via sidebar

passed_tests: Frontend teacher dashboard display with stats cards
Frontend teacher My Courses page navigation
Frontend student dashboard display with stats cards
Frontend student My Courses page navigation
Frontend student dashboard sections (Attendance Overview, Recent Progress, Recent Announcements)

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (8/10 major flows working, navigation and logout issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix sidebar navigation click handlers for both teacher and student roles (Dashboard, Attendance, Assignments, Progress pages), implement accessible logout functionality in user dropdown menus, fix student courses display to show enrolled courses, and resolve chart rendering issues in dashboards.
